_meta.purpose: Combinatorial positioning-flight search. Each hub lists nearby airports reachable by ground transport so the planner can split an itinerary at the LCC hub it actually serves. Distances/costs verified against carrier and operator pages May 2026; refresh quarterly.

category_codes.lcc_hub: Dominated by low-cost carriers; good for short-haul positioning legs.
category_codes.long_haul_hub: Primary intercontinental gateway; good for the expensive leg of a split itinerary.

_meta.ground_cost_unit: USD (approximate one-way, public-transport tier; taxis and private transfers ignored)
